text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Not agaaain. Ughhh, I've been waking up so
early recently.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That part-time job I've been doing does involve a
lot of sitting down... Maybe I'm not getting
enough exercise?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I should really be getting proper rest. Okay,
I'll just go back to sleep...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Scratch that! I want to get out there and run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Ines Fujin is so eager to run that
she's waking up early and missing out on sleep...
